content_rules.description: Per 2-week cycle: 3 educational posts, 2 engagement/opinion posts, 1 personal/career story
format_preferences: End with question to drive comments
1-3 relevant hashtags at the end (not inline)

anti_slop_rules: NEVER use: 'In today's fast-paced world', 'Game-changer', 'Leverage', 'Synergy', 'Delighted to share', 'Thrilled to announce', 'It's not about X, it's about Y'
Every draft MUST have [INSERT YOUR REAL EXAMPLE HERE] placeholders
Claude REFUSES to generate 'finished' posts — only drafts requiring human editing
First-person voice. Short sentences. No corporate speak.
Comments: never 'Great post!' — always add unique perspective or question
No emoji walls. Max 2 emojis per post, and only if natural.
No 'I'm humbled' or 'I'm honored' unless genuinely appropriate
